about.title: About Me
about.body: Senior React Native and React developer with 7+ years of hands-on experience shipping production apps for regulated industries. I focus on clean architecture, reliable API and payment integrations, and practical solutions that deliver real business value — without over-engineering.
about.highlight1Text: Deep experience in React Native, code architecture, and system integration (API/Payment). I deliver high-quality, end-to-end solutions from UI to App Store release.
about.highlight2Text: Across diverse projects in banking, government, and fintech, I find solutions that meet business needs efficiently — focused on what works, not unnecessary complexity.
about.highlight3Text: 100% remote for 5+ years. Proven track record of clear communication, self-management, and high productivity in distributed teams.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Open to Senior React Native / React roles. Available to start immediately.
